title: [codereview-P3] spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:79 rx_valid_until_sfn note uses 'MUST ignore' without linking to exact SFN computation or beacon sfn field
description: After edit for 3i18.4.2, the validity check description should reference spec/09-packets-timing.md SFN and beacon sfn field. Add cross-ref. P3 for completeness.
